description: Alice Johnson, a Senior Financial Analyst, has called in sick for next Monday. As the Office Manager, triage her Odoo Calendar schedule for that day. Remove Alice Johnson from the attendees of the 'Team Standup' (9:00 AM) while keeping all other participants. Reschedule the 'Q2 Financial Review' (10:00 AM) to the following Friday at 10:00 AM. Delete the 'One-on-One with Mentor' (2:00 PM) meeting entirely. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin'.
